name: infocom-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IEEE INFOCOM (International Conference on Computer Communications), the IEEE ComSoc networking flagship: routing among the networking venues, the large-scale EDAS double-blind pipeline with its automated review assignment and early-reject phase, the IEEEtran two-column 10-page budget (9 pages of text with appendices counted, plus references), analytical/optimization-and-systems evidence, optional reproducibility, and the IEEE Xplore camera-ready. Grounded in the INFOCOM 2026 (Tokyo) and INFOCOM 2027 (Honolulu) calls, IEEE Xplore, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
